title: Keto and Kote
writer: Victor Dolidze, Avqsenti Tsagareli, Sergo Pashalishvili
actors: Medea Japaridze, Batu Kraveishvili, Tamari Chavchavadze
plot: Using a marriage broker,a Prince in dire financial straits plans to marry the wealthy daughter of a merchant, The girl is in love with the nephew of the prince. Forced by her father into the unwelcome match, she finds a friend in ...
